zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Wallcott於1362年出生在英國艾可波金時，她的父親Sir Walter Walcott24歲，母親Joan Clopton25歲。她於1382年與John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire在英國英格蘭艾可波金結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在她的家鄉享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Wallcott于1362年出生在英国艾可波金时，她的父亲Sir Walter Walcott24岁，母亲Joan Clopton25岁。她于1382年与John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire在英国英格兰艾可波金结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在她的家乡享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wallcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Walcott, Walcot, or Walcote, for example in Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Norfolk, Oxfordshire, and Wiltshire, all named in Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala) + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’ (plural cotu), i.e. ‘the cottage where the (Welsh-speaking) Britons lived’. This name is also frequent in Barbados and Jamaica, when emancipated slaves adopted it from the name of one or other of the sugar plantations owned there by English families called Walcott.
History: This surname was in MA from an early date. William Walcott emigrated from England to Salem, MA, in 1637; John Wolcott (1632–1690) is recorded in Springfield, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Wallcott was born in 1362, in Bocking, Essex, England, her father, Sir Walter Walcott, was 24 and her mother, Joan Clopton, was 25. She married John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire in 1382, in Bocking, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1460, in her hometown, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Wallcott est née en 1362, à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Walcott, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Clopton, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire en 1382, à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Wallcott 1362 in Bocking, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Walter Walcott 24 und ihre Mutter Joan Clopton 25. Sie hat 1382 in Bocking, Essex, England, United Kingdom John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 98 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Wallcott è nata il nel 1362 nel Bocking, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir Walter Walcott, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan Clopton, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire nel 1382, nel Bocking, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Wallcottが1362年にイギリスエセックスボクイングで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Walcottは24歳，母Joan Cloptonは25歳であった。1382年にイギリスイギリスエセックスボクイングでJohn Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年に故郷で98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Wallcott(이)가 1362년 영국 에세스 보킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Walcott(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Clopton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 보킨그에서 John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 그녀의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Wallcott nasceu em 1362, em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Walcott, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Clopton, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire em 1382, em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1460, em sua cidade natal, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Wallcott родилась в 1362 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Walcott было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Clopton, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire в 1382 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1460 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Wallcott nació en 1362, en Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Walcott, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Clopton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire en 1382, en Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1460, en su pueblo, a la edad de 98 años.
